title: Refresh dependency update supply-chain evidence

intent.problem: Dependabot dependency updates changed the committed supply-chain evidence and the PR must retain repository governance evidence.
constraints: Keep release and supply-chain evidence internally consistent.
intent.rationale: Synchronize generated evidence and archive the governed Work Item required by PR policy.

sources.reason: Generates and validates committed supply-chain evidence.
Requires archived Work Item evidence in PR diffs.

problemStatement: Dependency update evidence must be synchronized and governed.
acceptance: The dependency update and its supply-chain evidence remain internally consistent.
The PR contains an auditable archived Work Item pair.

riskAssessment.reason: Only dependency pins, generated evidence, and governance archive records are changed.

executionDecision.reason: The PR CI governance check identified the missing archive evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Keep dependency and evidence synchronization reviewable.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized processing the Dependabot PR and its governed evidence.

rollbackNote: Revert the dependency update and its generated evidence commit if CI or review identifies a regression.
